posts.title: PVHS Spring Concert
posts.summary: Pioneer Valley High School invites the community to the Spring Concert on Monday, May 18 at 6:30pm in the Performing Arts Center.
posts.author: Araceli Mandujano-Padilla
posts.body: Pioneer Valley High School is pleased to announce our upcoming Spring Concert. We invite you to join us on Monday, May 18, at 6:30pm in the Performing Arts Center.

posts.title: College Craze Thursday
posts.summary: Tomorrow is College Craze Thursday. Remember to wear your college gear. Teacher Spotlight: Mrs. Domingues.
posts.author: Rocio Trujillo
posts.body: Tomorrow is College Craze Thursday. Remember to wear your college gear. Teacher Spotlight: Mrs. Domingues teaches Math Analysis and Math II and attended St. Mary's College of CA.

posts.title: Final Reminder: Future Panther Night is Tomorrow (4/29 Wednesday)
posts.summary: Final reminder for Future Panther Night with an updated schedule. Doors open at 5:30 PM in the Panther Gym and live performances begin at 5:45 PM.
posts.author: Jeffrey Hromadka
posts.body: Final reminder: Future Panther Night is tomorrow. Doors open at 5:30 PM in the Panther Gym and live performances begin at 5:45 PM. Please arrive by 5:30 PM to grab a seat and enjoy the opening ceremonies.

posts.title: 📢 CAASPP Testing Begins Tomorrow – Juniors (ELA & Math)
posts.summary: Junior students begin CAASPP testing in English Language Arts and Mathematics. The assessments help measure student progress on California standards.
posts.author: Merrie Okie
posts.body: Junior students will begin California Assessment of Student Performance and Progress (CAASPP) testing in English Language Arts and Mathematics. The CAASPP system includes the Smarter Balanced Assessments, which measure what students know and are able to do based on California standards.

posts.title: Future Panther Night
posts.summary: Future Panther Night invites prospective students and families to discover the Panther experience on Wednesday, April 29 from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM.
posts.author: Jeffrey Hromadka
posts.body: Future Panther Night is coming up for prospective students and families joining Pioneer Valley High School. The event is Wednesday, April 29 from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM in the Panther Gym.

posts.title: Sexual Assault Awareness Week | Wellness Center Activities & Resources
posts.summary: The Wellness Center, in partnership with the SHARe & Care Club, is hosting Sexual Assault Awareness Week with dress-up themes, activities, and resources.
posts.author: Crystal Buchan
posts.body: The Wellness Center, in partnership with the SHARe & Care Club, is hosting Sexual Assault Awareness Week. This week raises awareness, promotes consent, and reminds the school community that support and resources are available.

posts.title: ⏰ Tomorrow: Final College Funding Workshop (5:30 PM)
posts.summary: Final college funding workshop for seniors and families. EAOP and the SB Scholarship Foundation will help compare final college costs.
posts.author: Israel Hernandez
posts.body: The May 1 decision deadline is just days away. Join the final College Funding Workshop on Tuesday, April 28 from 5:30 PM to 6:30 PM. Experts from EAOP and the SB Scholarship Foundation will help families compare final college costs side by side.

posts.title: Save the Date (Wed, April 29 from 5:00-7:00) Future Panther Night!
posts.summary: Save the date for Future Panther Night on Wednesday, April 29 from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM in the Pioneer Valley High School Gym.
posts.author: Jeffrey Hromadka
posts.body: Save the date for Future Panther Night. Prospective students and families are invited on Wednesday, April 29 from 5:00 PM to 7:00 PM in the Pioneer Valley High School Gym.

posts.title: PVHS Weekly Newsletter 4/24/2026
posts.summary: Weekly PVHS newsletter with school updates including Taco Tuesday, hiring updates, CAASPP testing, special education prom, senior spotlight, CIF playoffs, and more.
posts.author: Araceli Mandujano-Padilla
posts.body: PVHS Weekly Newsletter for April 24, 2026. Updates include Taco Tuesday, hiring updates, CAASPP testing, Special Education Prom, senior spotlight, CIF playoff updates, Launch for College, FFA recognition, ELAC, and more.

posts.title: 🎓 Don't Leave Money on the Table: Award Letter Night is Tuesday, 4/28!
posts.summary: Seniors accepted to four-year colleges are invited to an Award Letter Workshop before the May 1 decision deadline.
posts.author: Israel Hernandez
posts.body: Seniors accepted to four-year colleges are invited to an Award Letter Workshop before the May 1 National Decision Deadline. This is a final opportunity to sit down with experts from EAOP and review college costs before committing.

posts.title: 🏫 Yearbook Update - PVHS
posts.summary: Yearbook sales and distribution begin May 27th. Go to the Business Office window to purchase, or room 431 if you pre-purchased.
posts.author: Daniel Dearborn
posts.body: Yearbook sales and distribution begin May 27th. Go to the Business Office window to purchase, or room 431 if you pre-purchased.
